title: Use of English - Test 1
explanation:
Use of English - B1 Test 1

Mixed grammar and vocabulary review.

questions.text: I [*have been working|worked|am working] here since 2019.
If I had seen the message, I [*would have replied|would reply|replied] sooner.
The report [*was written|wrote|was writing] by our team leader.

exercise_sets.title: Exercise 2
exercise_sets.instructions: Choose the correct option for each gap.

questions.text: He told me ____ be late. | *not to | to not | not
This is the woman ____ brother works with me. | *whose | who | where
You do not have to come, but you ____ let me know. | *should | mustn't | would
We ran ____ of coffee this morning. | *out | up | off
I do not mind [*waiting|to wait|wait] a few more minutes.
The shop gave me a full [*refund|broadcast|promotion] after the complaint.
By the time we arrived, the film [*had started|started|has started].
If he [*were|was|is] more organised, he would miss fewer deadlines.
